content_body:
My husband and I booked this cabin for a belated first anniversary trip. We loved the pictures of the pond and the historical details of the house. We ended up inviting another couple to join us to get some much-needed friend time and it was exactly what we needed!


We enjoyed cooking and baking together, playing games, and even got to order in from the Toccoa Riverside Restaurant (highly recommend). Even though it rained one day we had a great time just hanging out in the cabin and on the screened porch. The fire table got a lot of use with us!


On Saturday, with better weather, we were able to explore the space more and walk along the river. We also put our wilderness skills to the test by attempting a fire in the fire pit. We used a whole box of fire starters, but still didn’t get the roaring blaze we were looking for, but at least had a lot of fun in the attempt! Thank you so much for a great weekend ~ GA and NC
title: Belated Anniversary Trip!
